[Question]
What could be the possible causes of toothache?

Toothache can be caused by several factors, including tooth decay, gum disease, a cracked tooth, an exposed tooth root, a sinus condition, or an impacted tooth. Other possible causes include grinding teeth (bruxism), a jaw joint disorder (TMJ), or an abscess. Poor oral hygiene and dietary habits can also contribute to tooth pain. If the pain is severe or persists, it is advisable to consult a dentist.
